stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Where is the autothrust ON switch located on an Airbus Flight Control Unit (FCU)?

options.a: The button labelled A/THR in the centre of the panel.
options.b: The button labelled APPR on the right-hand side of the panel.
options.c: The button labelled TOGA on the throttle quadrant.
options.d: The button labelled EXPED in between the A/THR and EXPED buttons.
